title: Electric water heater — couple (prefer 50–80 L storage)

filtersApplied.typePrefer: storage tank (simpler install); instant listed with wiring caveat

sizeGuide.40L: Tight for two if simultaneous shower + kitchen — adjacent only
sizeGuide.50L: Recommended default for couple, one main bathroom
sizeGuide.80L: Recommended if you want buffer / two showers in a row
sizeGuide.100L: Usually more than needed for two — only if long baths or multi-point

shoppingRoute: Filter Main 50 L or Main 80 L first
Prefer storage electric (Ariston / Fresh / Olympic / Unionaire) with clear tank warranty
Confirm vertical vs horizontal for your wall space
Budget electrician install — never hang a full tank on weak fixings
If considering instant: electrician must size cable/breaker before purchase
Re-check B.TECH/Amazon price day of buy
